
title: Monthly Employment
author: Mohsen
YEAR: `r Sys.YEAR()`
output:
    html_document:
      theme: readable    
      highlight: kate
      toc: true    
      toc_depth: 4
      toc_float: true    
      data_print: paged
      code_folding: hide    
      css: styles.css
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72


```{r setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
# Set global options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, cache = TRUE)
```

```{r loadlibraries, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tempdisagg)
library(zoo)
library(foreign)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
```

```{r loadd_ata, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
data <- read_dta("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/psid_employment_long.dta")
```

```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    month = str_extract(MONTH_YEAR, "^[A-Z]+"),
    year = str_extract(MONTH_YEAR, "\\d+$")
  )

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    month = match(month, toupper(month.abb))
  )


data <- data %>%
  select(-MONTH_YEAR)

```

```{r}
data <- data %>%
  group_by(ID) %>%
  mutate(
    LAG_UNE_ = lag(UNE_),
    LAG_EMP_ = lag(EMP_),
    LAG_OUT_ = lag(OUT_)
  )
```

```{r}
data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    LAG_UNE_ = coalesce(LAG_UNE_, 0),
    LAG_EMP_ = coalesce(LAG_EMP_, 0),
    LAG_OUT_ = coalesce(LAG_OUT_, 0),
    WEIGHT_  = coalesce(WEIGHT_, 0)
  )

```

```{r reshape , warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
data$WEIGHT_ <- as.numeric(data$WEIGHT_)
data$LAG_UNE_ <- as.numeric(data$LAG_UNE_)
data$LAG_EMP_ <- as.numeric(data$LAG_EMP_)
data$LAG_OUT_ <- as.numeric(data$LAG_OUT_)

```

```{r reshape , warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_UNE_ <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_UNE_ = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer(LAG_UNE_ == 1), na.rm = TRUE))

SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_OUT_ <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_OUT_ = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer(LAG_OUT_ == 1), na.rm = TRUE))

SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_ <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_ = sum(WEIGHT_ * as.integer(LAG_EMP_ == 1), na.rm = TRUE))

```

```{r}
SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_UNEMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_UNEMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * 
                                          as.integer((LAG_EMP_ == 1) & 
                                                     (EMP_ == 1)), 
                                          na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_EMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_EMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * 
                                          as.integer((LAG_UNE_ == 1) & 
                                                     (EMP_ == 1)), 
                                          na.rm = TRUE), .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_INAC <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_INAC = sum(WEIGHT_ * 
                                         as.integer((LAG_EMP_ == 1) & 
                                                    (OUT_ == 1))), 
                                         na.rm = TRUE, .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_EMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_EMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * 
                                         as.integer((LAG_OUT_ == 1) & 
                                                    (EMP_ == 1))), 
                                         na.rm = TRUE, .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_INAC <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_INAC = sum(WEIGHT_ * 
                                           as.integer((LAG_UNE_ == 1) & 
                                                      (OUT_ == 1))), 
                                           na.rm = TRUE, .groups = 'drop')

SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_UNEMP <- data %>%
  group_by(year, month) %>%
  summarise(SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_UNEMP = sum(WEIGHT_ * 
                                           as.integer((LAG_OUT_ == 1) & 
                                                      (UNE_ == 1))), 
                                           na.rm = TRUE, .groups = 'drop')

```

```{r}
TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP <- -log(1 - SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_UNEMP$SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_UNEMP / SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_$SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_)

TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP <- -log(1 - SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_EMP$SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_EMP / SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_UNE_$SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_UNE_)

TR_EMP_TO_INAC <- -log(1 - SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_INAC$SUM_WEIGHT_EMP_TO_INAC / SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_$SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_EMP_)

TR_INAC_TO_EMP <- -log(1 - SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_EMP$SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_EMP / SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_OUT_$SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_OUT_)

TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC <- -log(1 - SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_INAC$SUM_WEIGHT_UNEMP_TO_INAC / SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_UNE_$SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_UNE_)

TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP <- -log(1 - SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_UNEMP$SUM_WEIGHT_INAC_TO_UNEMP / SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_OUT_$SUM_WEIGHT_LAG_OUT_)

```

```{r}
TR <- data.frame(year = data$year, 
                 month = data$month,
                 TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP, 
                 TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP, 
                 TR_EMP_TO_INAC, 
                 TR_INAC_TO_EMP, 
                 TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC, 
                 TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP)

TR <- TR %>%
  mutate(YEAR = ymd(paste0(year, "-", month, "-01"))) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)

# Ensure uniqueness based on YEAR and specific transition rate column
TR_TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP <- TR %>%
  filter(!is.na(TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP)) %>%
  distinct(YEAR, TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)

TR_TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP <- TR %>%
  filter(!is.na(TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP)) %>%
  distinct(YEAR, TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)

TR_TR_EMP_TO_INAC <- TR %>%
  filter(!is.na(TR_EMP_TO_INAC)) %>%
  distinct(YEAR, TR_EMP_TO_INAC, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)

TR_TR_INAC_TO_EMP <- TR %>%
  filter(!is.na(TR_INAC_TO_EMP)) %>%
  distinct(YEAR, TR_INAC_TO_EMP, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)

TR_TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC <- TR %>%
  filter(!is.na(TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC)) %>%
  distinct(YEAR, TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)

TR_TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP <- TR %>%
  filter(!is.na(TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP)) %>%
  distinct(YEAR, TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(YEAR)
```

```{r}
plot_transition_rates <- function(df, transition_col, title) {
  ggplot(df, aes(x = YEAR, y = !!sym(transition_col))) +
    geom_line(color = "steelblue", size = 1.5) +
    labs(x = "Year", y = "Transition Rate", title = title) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
          axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
          axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
          legend.position = "none")
}

# Plot and save Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate
p_emp_to_unemp <- plot_transition_rates(TR_TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP, "TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP", "Transition Rate from Employment to Unemployment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Transition_Employment_to_Unemployment.png", p_emp_to_unemp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate
p_unemp_to_emp <- plot_transition_rates(TR_TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP, "TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP", "Transition Rate from Unemployment to Employment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Transition_Unemployment_to_Employment.png", p_unemp_to_emp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate
p_emp_to_inac <- plot_transition_rates(TR_TR_EMP_TO_INAC, "TR_EMP_TO_INAC", "Transition Rate from Employment to Inactivity")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Transition_Employment_to_Inactivity.png", p_emp_to_inac, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate
p_inac_to_emp <- plot_transition_rates(TR_TR_INAC_TO_EMP, "TR_INAC_TO_EMP", "Transition Rate from Inactivity to Employment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Transition_Inactivity_to_Employment.png", p_inac_to_emp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate
p_unemp_to_inac <- plot_transition_rates(TR_TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC, "TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC", "Transition Rate from Unemployment to Inactivity")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Transition_Unemployment_to_Inactivity.png", p_unemp_to_inac, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Plot and save Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate
p_inac_to_unemp <- plot_transition_rates(TR_TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP, "TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP", "Transition Rate from Inactivity to Unemployment")
ggsave("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/Transition_Inactivity_to_Unemployment.png", p_inac_to_unemp, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(lubridate)


BLS <- read_excel("D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/fallick_and_fleischman.xlsx")
BLS <- BLS %>%
  rename(YEAR = `Year:Mnth`)


BLS$YEAR <- parse_date_time(BLS$YEAR, "ym")

library(purrr)
BLS <- BLS %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ as.numeric(as.character(.))))

BLS <- BLS %>%
  mutate(across(c(EUpop, UEpop, NEpop, ENpop, NUpop, UNpop), ~ . / 100))

```


```{r}

combined_df <- BLS %>%
  select(YEAR, EUpop, UEpop, NEpop, ENpop, NUpop, UNpop) %>%
  rename(
    BLS_EU_Transition_Rate = EUpop,
    BLS_UE_Transition_Rate = UEpop,
    BLS_IE_Transition_Rate = NEpop,
    BLS_EI_Transition_Rate = ENpop,
    BLS_IU_Transition_Rate = NUpop,
    BLS_UI_Transition_Rate = UNpop
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR_TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP) %>%
      rename(TR_EU_Transition_Rate = TR_EMP_TO_UNEMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR_TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP) %>%
      rename(TR_UE_Transition_Rate = TR_UNEMP_TO_EMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR_TR_EMP_TO_INAC %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_EMP_TO_INAC) %>%
      rename(TR_EI_Transition_Rate = TR_EMP_TO_INAC),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR_TR_INAC_TO_EMP %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_INAC_TO_EMP) %>%
      rename(TR_IE_Transition_Rate = TR_INAC_TO_EMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR_TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC) %>%
      rename(TR_UI_Transition_Rate = TR_UNEMP_TO_INAC),
    by = "YEAR"
  ) %>%
  full_join(
    TR_TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP %>%
      select(YEAR, TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP) %>%
      rename(TR_IU_Transition_Rate = TR_INAC_TO_UNEMP),
    by = "YEAR"
  )

```

```{r}

# Load required packages
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)
library(rlang)

plot_and_save <- function(df, bls_col, tr_col, title, file_path) {
  # Remove rows with missing values in the specified columns
  df_clean <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(.[[bls_col]]) & !is.na(.[[tr_col]]))
  
  # Check if TR_Scaled column is present, otherwise return an error
  if (!tr_col %in% colnames(df_clean)) {
    stop("The specified TR column does not exist in the data frame.")
  }
  
  # Create the plot
  p <- ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = YEAR)) +
    geom_line(aes(y = !!sym(bls_col), color = "BLS"), size = 1.2) +
    geom_line(aes(y = !!sym(tr_col), color = "PSID"), size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = "YEAR", title = title) +
    scale_color_manual(name = "Legend", values = c("BLS" = "blue", "PSID" = "red")) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  # Save the plot to the specified file path
  ggsave(file_path, plot = p)
}

# Plot Employment to Unemployment
plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "BLS_EU_Transition_Rate", "TR_EU_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Employment to Unemployment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/tr_EU_vs_bls.png"
)

# Plot Unemployment to Employment
plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "BLS_UE_Transition_Rate", "TR_UE_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Unemployment to Employment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/tr_UE_vs_bls.png"
)

# Plot Employment to Inactivity
plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "BLS_EI_Transition_Rate", "TR_EI_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Employment to Inactivity Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/tr_EI_vs_bls.png"
)

# Plot Inactivity to Employment
plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "BLS_IE_Transition_Rate", "TR_IE_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Inactivity to Employment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/tr_IE_vs_bls.png"
)

# Plot Unemployment to Inactivity
plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "BLS_UI_Transition_Rate", "TR_UI_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Unemployment to Inactivity Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/tr_UI_vs_bls.png"
)

# Plot Inactivity to Unemployment
plot_and_save(
  combined_df, "BLS_IU_Transition_Rate", "TR_IU_Transition_Rate",
  "Comparison: Inactivity to Unemployment Transition Rate",
  "D:/PSID_SHELF/06_Employment/Graph/tr_IU_vs_bls.png"
)

```
